chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-171 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 536/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.Fororderson CMA 537/25 4.For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Qudratullah Rajput, Advocate for the applicant. ***** By way of the instant petition, the petitioner seeks implementation of order dated 24.05.2025 passed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-III/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur Mirs, in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2035 of 2025, whereby the concerned SHO was directed to record the statement of the petitioner and, after collecting the final medico-legal certificate(s) of the injured, to proceed strictly in accordance with the provisions of Section 154, CrPC, if a cognizable offence is made out, and in case of a non- cognizable offence, to act strictly in accordance with Section 155, CrPC. However, without first approaching the learned Justice of Peace for redressal of his grievance in accordance with the law, the petitioner has directly approached this Court, which is not sustainable under the law. The petitioner was required to avail proper remedy before the competent forum, even otherwise he is set at liberty to avail the remedy by filing Crl. Direct Complaint under section 200 CrPC, if needed. Accordingly, this petition, being premature and misconceived, is dismissed in limine along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
